text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Nooo! I was sooo close! I almost had it!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
It was fun, though. One second I was holding
back, the next I was vying for the lead...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
But none of that changes the facts—it's still super
frustrating!
choice_data_list: Your performance today wasn't half bad.
Let's win the next one for sure!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Ehehe, thanks. I gave it my best shot, and I
placed too, so, yeah, it wasn't all bad.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
But you know, I'm always wanting more. I want to
place first!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
So to get that win, I'll need you to ramp up our
training schedule! Be as tough on me as you
want—I can handle it!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! I'm going to use the pain of losing to fuel
my training!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
I'll work even harder to win next time! Let's work
as a team, Trainer!
